flaggedZones.instruction: Break the short-answer chain with participial connectors and one compound clause so the captain exchange keeps pressure without flatlining into clipped beats.
In the infirmary deduction run, add ', Ving' linkage between Jaina's readings and commands so the analysis carries forward instead of landing as separate short hits.

When Jaina and Sylvanas converge on the grain answer, add connective tissue across adjacent paragraphs—participial phrases first, then selective compound joins—to stop the discovery sequence reading as isolated data drops.
The supplier-summary burst needs one longer sentence with embedded apposition or a compound turn to keep the rapid facts from snapping into telegram prose.
During the first part of Davan's questioning, join the Q-and-A beats with action-linked participial phrasing so fear, aim, and interrogation pressure share a sentence more often.
The whole interrogation block needs broader syntactic variety: add participial bridges, a few compound clauses, and one earned longer sentence per exchange cluster to lift overall texture.
In Davan's disclosure run, replace some back-to-back short lines with longer carries that braid dialogue, tremor, and inference into the same sentence.
The 'Horse. Height. A mark.' segment needs immediate connective tissue after the fragment cluster—prefer a follow-on compound sentence instead of another short drop.
From the mark question through Sylvanas's command, enrich the line chain with participial and subordinate constructions so the scene keeps compression without losing prose texture.
The post-poison realization sequence should keep its shock but needs one or two clause-heavy sentences to connect diagnosis, age, and conclusion rather than stacking bare confirmations.
The Andorhal pivot needs connective phrasing between Jaina's medical timetable and the departure decision so the handoff lands as escalation instead of a short-line relay.

textureFindings.priorityInstruction: Participial density is 7.3% against a 12.0% target, so add ', Ving' connective phrases across every flagged zone first; that is the fastest way to lift both the below-range participial metric and the overall texture score.
